name: hubcontabil
description: MVP interno para gerenciamento operacional de escritório contábil.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @hubcontabil/api" "npm run dev -w @hubcontabil/worker" "npm run dev -w @hubcontabil/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hubcontabil/shared && npm run build -w @hubcontabil/api && npm run build -w @hubcontabil/worker && npm run build -w @hubcontabil/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @hubcontabil/shared && npm run test -w @hubcontabil/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @hubcontabil/shared && npm run typecheck -w @hubcontabil/api && npm run typecheck -w @hubcontabil/worker && npm run typecheck -w @hubcontabil/web
